The '''reverse-polarity pulse grenade''' was a specialized [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] that emitted a reversing polarity pulse wave upon detonation. This had the effect of disabling [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and machines caught within the blast radius of the grenade by overloading their systems. The RPP grenade was one of the many weapons of [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC troopers]]. However, using the grenade also disrupted the sensors of the ARC trooper's [[Clone trooper/Legends#Armor|armor]], requiring a few minutes to re-calibrate for full function of the sensors. Because of this, it was not commonly employed by standard clone troopers.

{{Weapon-stub}}
